# SoloLife OS - Search Engine Instructions
User-agent: *

# Block access to management and data layers
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /sys-admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login/

# Allow indexing of all public content
Allow: /
Allow: /article/
Allow: /category/
Allow: /about/

# Point crawlers to the sitemap (Generated by Django)
Sitemap: https://sololife-six.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
